step_by_step_reasoning: Based on the transcript, Sanofi's Darwin data science environment enables 30-40 analyst users to securely analyze health data. The architecture starts with a static frontend (S3 website, CloudFront CDN, Cognito with SSO authentication). The dynamic backend leverages API Gateway and DynamoDB for actions and tracing. To provision isolated analytical environments, API Gateway communicates with Service Catalog, which uses CloudFormation to launch SageMaker notebooks and custom RStudio instances (mapped to EC2). For AI capabilities, API Gateway invokes distinct Lambda functions: one utilizing the Amazon Translate SDK for batch document translations, and another leveraging Comprehend Medical to identify and de-identify critical medical metadata. All processed and source datasets are stored securely within isolated S3 buckets and a central Data Lake.

graph.name: Sanofi - Secure Real-World Evidence Data Science Platform
graph.notes: Secure environment designed for data scientists to run smart data analytics. Designed around strong auditing, data segregation, and restricted data downloads.

nodes.name: Sanofi Data Scientists
nodes.notes: Analyst team conducting medical analytics using RStudio and SageMaker.

nodes.name: CloudFront Distribution
nodes.notes: Serves static content and manages HTTPS certificates.

nodes.name: Portal Static Hosting
nodes.notes: S3 bucket configured for static portal hosting.

nodes.name: Cognito Federated Identity
nodes.notes: Authenticates users via federation with Sanofi's internal SSO.

nodes.name: API Gateway
nodes.notes: Directs dynamic API calls and handles portal operations.

nodes.name: User Trace DynamoDB
nodes.notes: WORKLOAD_PEEK: Tracks metadata and audit logs for all user activities.

nodes.name: Service Catalog Portfolio
nodes.notes: Allows users to self-provision pre-configured templates.

nodes.name: SageMaker Notebooks
nodes.notes: WORKLOAD_PEEK: Provisioned with 100GB encrypted disks for secure workspaces.

nodes.name: RStudio Workspace
nodes.notes: Custom EC2 instances running RStudio for analytical modeling.

nodes.name: Data Lake & User S3 Buckets
nodes.notes: DATA_PEEK: Real World Evidence datasets kept secure within the cloud perimeter.

nodes.name: Translation Worker
nodes.notes: Batch translates files via AWS SDK integration.

nodes.name: Amazon Translate
nodes.notes: Performs bulk machine translation of raw medical records.

nodes.name: Comprehend Medical
nodes.notes: Identifies sensitive medical entities to allow data curation.

edges.notes: Requests auth token via SSO federated SSO
Spins up custom RStudio EC2 instance
Saves translated file to sandbox bucket
Persists structured findings to user storage
